language_applied_globally: Language will be applied across the entire app
language_restart_note: When you change the language, the app screens will update instantly. All your data and settings will be preserved.
share_code_desc: Share this code with your family members to link their accounts
mostly_normal_some_notes: Most of your tests are normal with minor notes
visit_doctor_vitamin_d: We recommend visiting a doctor to determine the appropriate dose
hba1c_due_date: It is time for your monthly HbA1c test
drink_water_advice: Keep drinking 8 cups of water daily to improve your general health and enhance body functions. Water is essential for kidney health and improving focus!
fasting_sugar_interp: Blood sugar level within normal fasting range.
hemoglobin_interp: Hemoglobin level is very good, indicating no anemia.
cholesterol_interp: Slight elevation in total cholesterol level.
reduce_fat_advice: It is advised to reduce saturated fats, exercise and consult a doctor.
sun_exposure_advice: It is advised to get sun exposure and take supplements after consulting a doctor.
wbc_interp: White blood cell count is healthy, indicating no current infections.
immune_system_good_advice: The immune system is working well.
bp_interp: Blood pressure is within the ideal range.
exercise_stress_advice: Maintain physical activity and manage stress.
ai_analysis_note: 💡 Note: These results were analyzed by AI, please consult a specialized doctor for accurate evaluation and medical follow-up.
here_to_support: We are here to support you at any time
faq_q1: How do I scan medical tests?
faq_a1: Click the camera icon on the homepage, then scan the test clearly. The app will analyze the results automatically and display them with interpretations.
faq_a2: Yes, all your data is encrypted with the highest security standards and is not shared with any third party. We adhere to HIPAA health data privacy standards.
faq_q3: How do I link a family member account?
faq_a3: From the profile page, click on Family System then Link a Family Account. Share the code with your family members so they can link it to your account.
faq_q4: Can I export my test results?
faq_a4: Yes, you can export all your results in PDF format. From the history page, click the export icon at the top of the page.
faq_q5: How do I add a medication reminder?
faq_a5: From the medication section in the bottom bar, click the add new medication button. Enter the medication details and schedule, and the app will remind you automatically.
faq_q6: What is the accuracy of the results analysis?
faq_a6: We use advanced AI technology with up to 95% accuracy. However, you should always consult a doctor for a final diagnosis.
emergency_note: This app is not a substitute for medical consultation. In case of emergency, call an ambulance immediately or head to the nearest hospital.
link_family_desc: You can link your account with family members to share results
getting_started_desc: Labby app is your personal companion to analyze and read medical test results using AI to facilitate understanding your health status.
step_1_desc: Click the camera icon on the homepage to take a picture of the test result or upload an image from the gallery. The app will analyze the results in seconds.
step_2_desc: You will get a simplified reading of the results indicated by colors (High, Low, Normal) along with personalized tips based on your condition.
step_3_desc: Track changes in your results over time through charts in the dashboard to monitor the progress of your condition.
step_4_desc: You can add your family members and track their tests from your personal account easily.
note_1: • AI results are not a substitute for consulting a specialized doctor.
note_2: • Ensure the image is clear when taken to guarantee accurate analysis.
note_3: • Your medical data is kept strictly confidential and secured with the highest levels of security.
test_results_desc: Notification when analysis of your results is complete
health_reminders_desc: Reminder for periodic tests and checkup appointments
family_updates_desc: Alert when a new test is added for a family member

drink_8_cups: Make sure to drink 8 cups of water

best_results_tip_desc: For best results, ensure the test image is clear and well-lit when capturing. Use a solid color background to facilitate the analysis process.
notification_control_desc: You can control notifications anytime from settings. Some important security-related notifications cannot be disabled.

data_collection_desc: We only collect medical analysis data that the user enters or captures. We do not collect any additional data without your explicit consent.

secure_servers: Data is stored securely on protected servers
no_sharing: Data is not shared with any third party

right_to_edit_desc: You can edit or update your data at any time
right_to_delete_desc: You can delete all your data permanently from the app
privacy_questions_desc: If you have any questions about the privacy policy, please feel free to contact us

glucose_interpretation: Blood sugar level is within normal range, indicating good glucose metabolism health.
glucose_advice: Maintain a healthy lifestyle with a balanced diet and regular exercise.
hemoglobin_interpretation: Hemoglobin level is normal, meaning the blood's oxygen-carrying capacity is good.
hemoglobin_advice: Continue eating iron-rich foods like red meat and leafy greens.
cholesterol_interpretation: Cholesterol level is slightly higher than normal, which may increase cardiovascular disease risk.
cholesterol_advice: It is recommended to reduce saturated fat intake, increase physical activity, and consult a doctor for follow-up.
vitamin_d_interpretation: Vitamin D level is low, which may affect bone and immune system health.
vitamin_d_advice: Sun exposure for 15-20 minutes daily and Vitamin D supplements after consulting a doctor are recommended.
wbc_interpretation: White blood cell count is within normal range, indicating good immune function.
wbc_advice: Continue healthy habits to boost your immune system.

terms_read_carefully: Please read these terms carefully before using the app
usage_text: The application is intended to help users understand and track medical test results easily. It should be used for personal purposes only.
not_a_doctor_replacement: The application is not a substitute for a specialist doctor.
consult_doctor_rule: A specialist doctor must be consulted in all medical cases
guidance_only_rule: The application provides guidance information only
not_comprehensive_rule: The application does not replace a comprehensive medical examination
accuracy_text: Results are analyzed using advanced AI, but 100% accuracy is not guaranteed. Errors in data reading or interpretation may occur.
responsibility_text: The user is fully responsible for using the information provided by the app.
no_liability_rule: We do not assume responsibility for any medical decisions made based on the app
medical_review_needed_rule: A doctor must be consulted before taking any medical action
data_accuracy_rule: The user is responsible for the accuracy of the data they enter
modifications_text: We reserve the right to update terms of use at any time. Users will be notified of any material changes.
acknowledge_terms_rule: You acknowledge that you have read and understood all terms and conditions
agree_usage_rule: You agree to use the application according to these terms
full_responsibility_rule: You bear full responsibility for your use of the application
not_medical_diagnosis: This app is only a help tool and is not a medical diagnosis. If you have any symptoms or concerns about your health, consult a specialist doctor immediately.
contact_support_msg: If you have any questions about the terms of use, contact the support team
view_trends: View trends of your results over time
delete_med_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this medication?
